sellers_note: Discover the 2025 Volkswagen Atlas 2.0T Peak Edition, a three-row SUV that combines practical space with refined comfort for families and adventurers alike. This White exterior model represents an excellent opportunity to own a versatile vehicle backed by factory warranty coverage and a clean history report. - 1 owner vehicle - Backup camera - Bluetooth connectivity - Clean history report - Heated seats - Premium sound system - Panoramic Moonroof - All-wheel drive - Leather seating - Automatic temperature control with dual-zone front air conditioning - Power liftgate - Heated and ventilated front bucket seats - Electronic stability control - Rear air conditioning - Heated door mirrors The Atlas delivers practical capability with its three-row seating arrangement, offering flexibility to accommodate passengers or cargo based on your needs. The heated and ventilated front seats provide comfort throughout the year, while the panoramic Moonroof floods the cabin with natural light. With all-wheel drive and a responsive 2.0L TSI engine paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission, this Atlas handles various road conditions with confidence. The vehicle achieves 18 mpg in city driving and 25 mpg on the highway, providing reasonable efficiency for a vehicle in this category. Inside, you'll find leather upholstery that enhances the cabin's quality, complemented by dual-zone automatic temperature control that keeps both driver and passenger comfortable. The power liftgate simplifies loading, while the heated steering wheel and heated door mirrors ensure comfort during colder months. The MIB3 infotainment system with SiriusXM satellite radio and steering wheel-mounted audio controls keeps you connected and entertained on every drive. Safety features include a backup camera, electronic stability control, four-wheel independent suspension, and a comprehensive airbag system. The vehicle comes equipped with brake assist and traction control, providing additional confidence during challenging driving situations. Remote keyless entry and an illuminated entry system add convenience to daily use. This non-smoker vehicle with just one previous owner represents an excellent choice for buyers seeking a well-maintained three-row SUV. The remaining factory warranty provides valuable coverage and peace of mind. The combination of practical design, comfortable appointments, and reliable engineering makes this Atlas a solid investment for your family's transportation needs. Contact us today to schedule a test drive and experience this Atlas firsthand. It's not just an Acura, it's an Acura of Berlin Acura!
